response.original_title: UFC Fight Night 274: Sterling vs. Zalal
response.overview: UFC Fight Night 274: Sterling vs. Zalal was a mixed martial arts event produced by the Ultimate Fighting Championship that took place on April 25, 2026, at the Meta Apex in Enterprise, Nevada, part of the Las Vegas Valley, United States. A featherweight bout between former UFC Bantamweight Champion Aljamain Sterling and Youssef Zalal served as the main event.
response.title: UFC Fight Night 274: Sterling vs. Zalal
